title: cyclosorus gongylodes var. hirsutus
intro: Cyclosorus gongylodes var. hirsutus is a type of fern, specifically a species of the Cyclosorus genus, characterized by its hairy fronds and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus gongylodes var. hirsutus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
